TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: milaedis u lisin nu Sakizaya. nilacul milaedis ayza a demiad "milaedis" ku Hupu a niyazu' i baluhayay a pakayingan milihiza kaku atu Sabak Tuduy saydanmilaedis ku niyazu' tu sakalima atu sakaenem a puu' nu mihicaan laedis han niyam ku mibutingay nu niyazu'u tatama ku misalami'ay caayay ku tatayna misalami'ay milaedis a lisin tungusay u binacadan a musuayaw tu i bayuay atu i pabaway i lalaay a ditu, zayhan palatatenga' kuheni tu tahakay unu katuuday a nipatudung,sisa masikaz ku heni tu tahak, a miadasay a taneng iyadahay ku nikala tu buting atu kabus. Kaluluwan a niyazu'anu milaedis (mipayhay)a kawaw hawsa u satabakiay a lisin lacus ku tatayna milihiza, patinaku u tatayna anu milihiza tu milaedis(payhay) hawsa, anu tabayu mibuting ku niyazu'aya tademaw acay pakala tu buting, sisa nawinian tayniay miazih a tatayna dada',caay tu kaazih ku cacayay nu niyazu'ay a tatayna, i sumamad u misaselalay ku tabayuay atu tasawaca mibuting,izaw kunikalaan tu tabakiay a buting adidiay a buting atu kalang, yadah ku mahicahicaay, zayhan malawilaw tunu ayzaay a satabakiay a liwliw,ayzaay a kawaw hatu nicakayanan tu nanpukuy a butingan nu Taywan,u patademaway a kawaw. malingatu u tumuk ku saayaway patababaw tu putut a mibetik milunguc, sikul kayadahen ku kala tu buting,malubicen ku tipus atu lihalay ku binacadan.pilaedisan caay patahkal dada' tu nuayzaay aheka tu nikauzip, nany aca u binacadan i lisin a kawaw, uzuma a minanam tu lalangawan u lisin nu binacadan, u zuma satuway a pakatineng tu kapahay a kawaw kasikz tu babalaki, amitanam kapulung mabalud,madikec a angil, u padutus tu nu Sakizaya a lalangawan cacay kasahenulan a kawaw ku mahiniay.
S.PHON: mir~…ĺa…ôdis u r~…ĺisin nu sakizaja. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ mir~…ĺa…ôdis ajza a d…ômiad "mir~…ĺa…ôdis" ku ńßupu a nijazu Ē~ ° i bar~…ĺuńßajaj a pakajiŇčan mir~…ĺińßiza kaku atu sabak tuduj sajdanmir~…ĺa…ôdis ku nijazu Ē~ ° tu sakar~…ĺima atu saka…ôn…ôm a puu Ē~ ° nu mińßi ¶aan r~…ĺa…ôdis ńßan nijam ku mibutiŇčaj nu nijazu Ē~ °u tatama ku misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj ¶aajaj ku tatajna misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj mir~…ĺa…ôdis a r~…ĺisin tuŇčusaj u bina ¶adan a musuajaw tu i bajuaj atu i pabawaj i r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj a ditu, zajńßan par~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° kuńß…ôni tu tańßakaj unu katuudaj a nipatuduŇč,sisa masikaz ku ńß…ôni tu tańßak, a miadasaj a tan…ôŇč ijadańßaj ku nikar~…ĺa tu butiŇč atu kabus. kar~…ĺur~…ĺuwan a nijazu Ē~ °anu mir~…ĺa…ôdis (mipajńßaj)a kawaw ńßawsa u satabakiaj a r~…ĺisin r~…ĺa ¶us ku tatajna mir~…ĺińßiza, patinaku u tatajna anu mir~…ĺińßiza tu mir~…ĺa…ôdis(pajńßaj) ńßawsa, anu tabaju mibutiŇč ku nijazu Ē~ °aja tad…ômaw a ¶aj pakar~…ĺa tu butiŇč, sisa nawinian tajniaj miazińß a tatajna dada Ē~ °, ¶aaj tu kaazińß ku ¶a ¶ajaj nu nijazu Ē~ °aj a tatajna, i sumamad u misas…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj ku tabajuaj atu tasawa ¶a mibutiŇč,izaw kunikar~…ĺaan tu tabakiaj a butiŇč adidiaj a butiŇč atu kar~…ĺaŇč, jadańß ku mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj, zajńßan mar~…ĺawir~…ĺaw tunu ajzaaj a satabakiaj a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw,ajzaaj a kawaw ńßatu ni ¶akajanan tu nanpukuj a butiŇčan nu tajwan,u patad…ômawaj a kawaw. mar~…ĺiŇčatu u tumuk ku saajawaj patababaw tu putut a mib…ôtik mir~…ĺuŇču ¶, sikur~…ĺ kajadańß…ôn ku kar~…ĺa tu butiŇč,mar~…ĺubi ¶…ôn ku tipus atu r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ku bina ¶adan.pir~…ĺa…ôdisan ¶aaj patańßkar~…ĺ dada Ē~ ° tu nuajzaaj ańß…ôka tu nikauzip, nanj a ¶a u bina ¶adan i r~…ĺisin a kawaw, uzuma a minanam tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan u r~…ĺisin nu bina ¶adan, u zuma satuwaj a pakatin…ôŇč tu kapańßaj a kawaw kasikz tu babar~…ĺaki, amitanam kapur~…ĺuŇč mabar~…ĺud,madik…ô ¶ a aŇčir~…ĺ, u padutus tu nu sakizaja a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ¶a ¶aj kasańß…ônur~…ĺan a kawaw ku mańßiniaj.
S.FORM: milaedis u lisin nu Sakizaya. nilacul milaedis ayza a demiad "milaedis" ku Hupu a niyazu' i baluhayay a pakayingan milihiza kaku atu Sabak Tuduy saydanmilaedis ku niyazu' tu sakalima atu sakaenem a puu' nu mihicaan laedis han niyam ku mibutingay nu niyazu'u tatama ku misalami'ay caayay ku tatayna misalami'ay milaedis a lisin tungusay u binacadan a musuayaw tu i bayuay atu i pabaway i lalaay a ditu, zayhan palatatenga' kuheni tu tahakay unu katuuday a nipatudung,sisa masikaz ku heni tu tahak, a miadasay a taneng iyadahay ku nikala tu buting atu kabus. Kaluluwan a niyazu'anu milaedis (mipayhay)a kawaw hawsa u satabakiay a lisin lacus ku tatayna milihiza, patinaku u tatayna anu milihiza tu milaedis(payhay) hawsa, anu tabayu mibuting ku niyazu'aya tademaw acay pakala tu buting, sisa nawinian tayniay miazih a tatayna dada',caay tu kaazih ku cacayay nu niyazu'ay a tatayna, i sumamad u misaselalay ku tabayuay atu tasawaca mibuting,izaw kunikalaan tu tabakiay a buting adidiay a buting atu kalang, yadah ku mahicahicaay, zayhan malawilaw tunu ayzaay a satabakiay a liwliw,ayzaay a kawaw hatu nicakayanan tu nanpukuy a butingan nu Taywan,u patademaway a kawaw. malingatu u tumuk ku saayaway patababaw tu putut a mibetik milunguc, sikul kayadahen ku kala tu buting,malubicen ku tipus atu lihalay ku binacadan.pilaedisan caay patahkal dada' tu nuayzaay aheka tu nikauzip, nany aca u binacadan i lisin a kawaw, uzuma a minanam tu lalangawan u lisin nu binacadan, u zuma satuway a pakatineng tu kapahay a kawaw kasikz tu babalaki, amitanam kapulung mabalud,madikec a angil, u padutus tu nu Sakizaya a lalangawan cacay kasahenulan a kawaw ku mahiniay.
S.PHON: mir~…ĺa…ôdis u r~…ĺisin nu sakizaja. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ mir~…ĺa…ôdis ajza a d…ômiad "mir~…ĺa…ôdis" ku ńßupu a nijazu Ē~ ° i bar~…ĺuńßajaj a pakajiŇčan mir~…ĺińßiza kaku atu sabak tuduj sajdanmir~…ĺa…ôdis ku nijazu Ē~ ° tu sakar~…ĺima atu saka…ôn…ôm a puu Ē~ ° nu mińßi ¶aan r~…ĺa…ôdis ńßan nijam ku mibutiŇčaj nu nijazu Ē~ °u tatama ku misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj ¶aajaj ku tatajna misar~…ĺami Ē~ °aj mir~…ĺa…ôdis a r~…ĺisin tuŇčusaj u bina ¶adan a musuajaw tu i bajuaj atu i pabawaj i r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj a ditu, zajńßan par~…ĺatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° kuńß…ôni tu tańßakaj unu katuudaj a nipatuduŇč,sisa masikaz ku ńß…ôni tu tańßak, a miadasaj a tan…ôŇč ijadańßaj ku nikar~…ĺa tu butiŇč atu kabus. kar~…ĺur~…ĺuwan a nijazu Ē~ °anu mir~…ĺa…ôdis (mipajńßaj)a kawaw ńßawsa u satabakiaj a r~…ĺisin r~…ĺa ¶us ku tatajna mir~…ĺińßiza, patinaku u tatajna anu mir~…ĺińßiza tu mir~…ĺa…ôdis(pajńßaj) ńßawsa, anu tabaju mibutiŇč ku nijazu Ē~ °aja tad…ômaw a ¶aj pakar~…ĺa tu butiŇč, sisa nawinian tajniaj miazińß a tatajna dada Ē~ °, ¶aaj tu kaazińß ku ¶a ¶ajaj nu nijazu Ē~ °aj a tatajna, i sumamad u misas…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺaj ku tabajuaj atu tasawa ¶a mibutiŇč,izaw kunikar~…ĺaan tu tabakiaj a butiŇč adidiaj a butiŇč atu kar~…ĺaŇč, jadańß ku mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj, zajńßan mar~…ĺawir~…ĺaw tunu ajzaaj a satabakiaj a r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw,ajzaaj a kawaw ńßatu ni ¶akajanan tu nanpukuj a butiŇčan nu tajwan,u patad…ômawaj a kawaw. mar~…ĺiŇčatu u tumuk ku saajawaj patababaw tu putut a mib…ôtik mir~…ĺuŇču ¶, sikur~…ĺ kajadańß…ôn ku kar~…ĺa tu butiŇč,mar~…ĺubi ¶…ôn ku tipus atu r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ku bina ¶adan.pir~…ĺa…ôdisan ¶aaj patańßkar~…ĺ dada Ē~ ° tu nuajzaaj ańß…ôka tu nikauzip, nanj a ¶a u bina ¶adan i r~…ĺisin a kawaw, uzuma a minanam tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan u r~…ĺisin nu bina ¶adan, u zuma satuwaj a pakatin…ôŇč tu kapańßaj a kawaw kasikz tu babar~…ĺaki, amitanam kapur~…ĺuŇč mabar~…ĺud,madik…ô ¶ a aŇčir~…ĺ, u padutus tu nu sakizaja a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ¶a ¶aj kasańß…ônur~…ĺan a kawaw ku mańßiniaj.
